name: Bahria Town
description: Bahria Town is a premium, privately developed residential and commercial community in Pakistan, known for its modern infrastructure, gated security, and well-planned urban design. It offers a wide range of residential plots, commercial areas, and luxury homes, along with amenities such as schools, hospitals, parks, mosques, shopping centers, and recreational facilities.
head_office_address: Central Business District, Phase‑8, Bahria Town, Rawalpindi, Pakistan

name: CDA
description: A CDA-approved society is a residential or commercial development officially regulated and sanctioned by the Capital Development Authority (CDA) of Islamabad. These societies comply with all legal and planning requirements, including land acquisition, layout approvals, utility connections, and environmental regulations.

name: Park View City
description: Park View City Islamabad is a modern, CDA-approved housing society located in Zone IV of Islamabad, developed by Vision Group. It is designed to provide a peaceful and luxurious lifestyle by combining modern infrastructure with natural beauty, as it is surrounded by the scenic Margalla Hills. The society offers a well-planned environment with residential and commercial areas, wide roads, underground utilities, and 24/7 security. It includes facilities such as parks, a botanical garden, schools, hospitals, mosques, shopping areas, and recreational spaces like a lake and dancing fountain. Park View City aims to create a self-sustained, eco-friendly community where residents can enjoy comfort, convenience, and a high standard of living within a secure and well-organized environment.
head_office_address: First Floor, Razia Sharif Plaza, 90 West, Blue Area, Islamabad, Pakistan

name: Ghauri Town
description: Ghauri Town's vision is to offer a complete and secure "dream home" solution with modern amenities and long-term investment potential.
head_office_address: Office #9, First Floor, Zaki Centre, I‑8 Markaz, Islamabad, Pakistan (Islamabad office used for Ghauri Town Phase 3/4/5 & development contact)
